# A rule with prereqs but no recipe adds those prereqs to
# other rules with the same target that have recipes.
# $prereq should include prereqs from both rules.
cp extra_dep extra_dep
cp source source
mk -n -p 1 -f mkfile
cmp stdout expected

-- mkfile --
result: extra_dep
result: source
	build $prereq
-- extra_dep --
-- source --
-- expected --
result: build extra_dep source
